prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约11780→12308→12169→14196→13439名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2021–2023年基本稳定在11780–12300区间，2024年大幅后移至1 4196名（后移约2000名），2025年小幅回升至13439名（前移约757名）。近两年波动幅度较大，2025年基准约13439名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年18 人、2022年17人、2023年15人、2024年43人、2025年44人；2026年计划大幅增至76人，较2025年扩招约72.7%。大幅扩招将显著降低竞争烈度，推动最低位次数字增大（更 易录取）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第28名（2026年），属国内顶尖工科院校。盘锦校区共享主校区办学 资源与学位，层次定位明确；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及投档线异常信号（2024年曾出现投档线降至420分的传闻）；抖音热度排名第5 5位，评价为较热，短视频平台曝光度中等。综合来看，负面舆情对报考热度有一定抑制作用，但985层次仍具较强吸引力；大连理工大学（主校区）第五轮学科 评估中A-及以上学科共10个，包括化学工程与技术A+、机械工程A、土木工程A、管理科学与工程A、工商管理A、力学A、软件工程A、生物医学工程A、控制科学与工程A-、环境科 学与工程A-。盘锦校区招生专业中能源化学工程对应化学工程与技术（A+），经济学类对应工商管理/应用经济学（A），学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 盘锦校区物理类 招生专业以能源化学工程、海洋技术、生物制造、生物信息学等为主，这些专业大类（生化环材类）社会热度偏低（明显劝退），经济学类热度分化观望。本省物理类考生2026年 约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。省控线数据：2025年物理类本科批405分、特殊类型招生控制线476分；该校位于辽宁省盘锦市，非热门地域。湖南省考生对东北地区高校的地域偏好一般，跨省报考需考虑地理位置因素，对位次有一定下移压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13439名、2026年大幅扩招72.7%（推动位次后移）、本省物理类考生增加8.4%（推动位次前移）、声誉偏负面及专业热度偏低（推动位次后移）等多重因素 ，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，是主导因素。预测2026年最低位次约19104名，区间18604–19600名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约19104名，区间18604–19600名。位次在此区间内建议以二档为主力（能源化学工程、智能海洋装备），一档经济学类可冲刺，三档专业（海洋技术、生物制造、生物 信息学）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<18604名）可重点冲刺经济学类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 11780 → 12308 → 12169 → 14196 → 13439, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the 11780–12300 range. In 2024, it significantly moved back to 14196 (a backward shift of about 2000 places), and in 2025, it slightly recovered to 13439 (a forward shift of about 757 places). The fluctuation range has been large in recent two years, with the 2025 baseline around 13439. The enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for the Physics Category was 18 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 15 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 44 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 76, an expansion of about 72.7% compared to 2025. The substantial expansion will significantly reduce competition intensity, pushing the minimum ranking number larger (easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 28th on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), belonging to the top-tier engineering universities in China. The Panjin Campus shares the main campus's educational resources and degrees, with a clear level positioning. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving abnormal signals in admission scores (rumors that the admission score line dropped to 420 points in 2024). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 55th, rated as relatively hot, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. Overall, negative public opinion has a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm, but the 985 level still has strong appeal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Dalian University of Technology (main campus) has a total of 10 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Business Administration A, Mechanics A, Software Engineering A, Biomedical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-. The Panjin Campus enrollment majors include Energy Chemical Engineering corresponding to Chemical Engineering and Technology (A+), and Economics Category corresponding to Business Administration/Applied Economics (A), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Panjin Campus Physics Category enrollment majors mainly include Energy Chemical Engineering, Marine Technology, Biomanufacturing, and Bioinformatics. These major categories (Biochemistry, Environmental, Chemical, Materials) have low social popularity (clearly discouraged), while the Economics Category has divided and wait-and-see popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 325,000 in 2025, with the expansion of examinees intensifying competition. Provincial control line data: In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 405 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 476 points. The university is located in Panjin City, Liaoning Province, which is not a popular region. Hunan Province examinees generally have average regional preference for universities in Northeast China, and cross-province applications need to consider geographical factors, exerting some downward pressure on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 13439, the significant expansion of 72.7% in 2026 (pushing rankings backward), the 8.4% increase in Physics Category examinees in this province (pushing rankings forward), slightly negative reputation and low major popularity (pushing rankings backward), the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee increase rate, making it the dominant factor. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 19104, with a range of 18604–19600.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 19104, range 18604–19600. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Energy Chemical Engineering, Intelligent Marine Equipment) as the main choice, with Tier 1 Economics Category as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Marine Technology, Biomanufacturing, Bioinformatics) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<18604) can focus on reaching for the Economics Category.
